retrieved_result: Can you plug the Kindle Paperwhite USB cable into an iPhone/iPad power adapter? \"John Santhosh, IOS Device User / Developer. Answered May 24, 2016Check behind your Kindle Paperwhite : Input : 5.25V – Max 500m AIt means that the kindle is compatible with any USB power adaptor having an output of 5.25V or less. Apple i Pad 10 Watt USB Power Adapter : Output : 5.1V - 2.1AApple i P
